KelThuzadChains.evidenceDescription: Counts the initial Chains cast as landed when the same user produces a Chains Link, Chains Pull, or Kel'Thuzad quest-progress event before the next Chains attempt and within the configured evidence window.

KelThuzadFrostNova.evidenceDescription: Counts a Frost Nova cast as landed when one or more enemy Hero units produce Kel'Thuzad quest progress after impact, or when they overlap the calibrated replay-position radius at the configured impact delay. The mechanic center-root radius is recorded separately; the larger replay radius compensates for one-second unit-position samples. Repeated target-point updates inside the configured dedupe window are treated as one cast, using the first target point in that cast cluster.
